goal: Identify actionable current investment opportunities across diverse sectors and markets

subtasks.prompt: Analyze current tech sector trends, valuations, and market conditions to identify 1-2 high-conviction investment opportunities. Consider AI, cloud, semiconductors, cybersecurity. Provide rationale, catalysts, risks, and upside potential.
subtasks.title: Tech Sector Opportunity Analysis

subtasks.prompt: Analyze current healthcare sector dynamics, including biotech, pharmaceuticals, medical devices, and healthcare services. Identify 1-2 compelling investment opportunities with strong clinical, regulatory, or demographic tailwinds.
subtasks.title: Healthcare Sector Opportunity Analysis

subtasks.prompt: Evaluate current energy markets, including oil, natural gas, renewables, and transition plays. Identify 1-2 investment opportunities driven by supply/demand imbalances, policy shifts, or technological breakthroughs.
subtasks.title: Energy Sector Opportunity Analysis

subtasks.prompt: Assess the banking, insurance, and fintech landscape. Identify 1-2 opportunities benefiting from interest rate trends, regulatory changes, or digital transformation.
subtasks.title: Financial Sector Opportunity Analysis

subtasks.prompt: Examine consumer spending patterns, brand strength, and e-commerce trends. Identify 1-2 investment opportunities in staples, discretionary, or luxury goods.
subtasks.title: Consumer Goods & Retail Opportunity Analysis

subtasks.prompt: Evaluate commercial and residential real estate markets, REITs, and property trends. Identify 1-2 opportunities leveraging interest rate expectations, demographic shifts, or sector-specific dynamics.
subtasks.title: Real Estate & REIT Opportunity Analysis

subtasks.prompt: Analyze global macro factors (inflation, GDP growth, central bank policy, geopolitical risks) to identify investment themes that cut across sectors. Propose 1-2 thematic opportunities (e.g., commodities, currencies, index plays).
subtasks.title: Macroeconomic & Cross-Sector Opportunity Analysis

subtasks.prompt: Screen for undervalued assets using quantitative criteria (low P/E, high free cash flow yield, momentum, etc.). Identify 1-2 statistically compelling opportunities across any sector or market.
subtasks.title: Quantitative Data Screening

subtasks.prompt: Analyze emerging market equities, bonds, and currencies. Identify 1-2 opportunities with strong growth drivers, favorable demographics, or reform catalysts.
subtasks.title: Emerging Markets Opportunity Analysis

subtasks.prompt: Evaluate the crypto landscape, including Bitcoin, Ethereum, DeFi, and regulatory developments. Identify 1-2 high-potential investments with clear catalysts and risk/reward profiles.
subtasks.title: Cryptocurrency & Digital Assets Analysis

success_criteria: At least 5 distinct investment opportunities identified
Each opportunity includes rationale, risk factors, and estimated return potential
Opportunities cover at least 3 different sectors/asset classes
All opportunities have been critically challenged and validated

verification_steps.prompt: Critically evaluate every investment opportunity proposed by the analysts. For each, identify potential flaws, overlooked risks, unrealistic assumptions, or conflicting evidence. Present counterarguments to ensure only robust opportunities survive.
